title: Field Service Engineer / Team Leader
description:
Hiring: Service Engineer (Marine Boilers) – Singapore

Global Boiler Services is seeking an experienced, self-motivated Service Engineer to join our Singapore team. If you thrive in a role that offers "freedom with responsibility" and enjoy the challenge of international maritime work, we want to hear from you.

Why Join Us?

  • Influence: High level of autonomy over your daily workflow.

  • Leadership: This position functions as a Team Leader for onsite projects.

  • Global Reach: Travel the world while representing a specialized industry leader.

What You’ll Do:

Perform fault finding, combustion adjustments, and control system upgrades on vessels globally. You will manage projects from engineering design assistance to final execution at sea.

Candidate Profile:

  • The Specialist: You have a deep understanding of mechanics and electrical systems, specifically PLC and relay-based controls.

  • The Traveler: You are ready for 160+ days of travel per year.

  • The Professional: You are structured, comfortable working independently, and possess a valid Seafarer’s Health Certificate/Discharge Book.

Requirements Checklist:

  • [ ] Singaporean / PR Status

  • [ ] Marine Engineering or Industrial Electrician background

  • [ ] Proven experience with steam plants/boilers

  • [ ] Fluent English

Apply Now:Contact Mr. Troels Larsen at +65 8688 8847 for more details.

postedCompany.description:
G&O Maritime Services Pte. Ltd - GLOBAL BOILER SERVICES & HJ lUBRICATORS 

The company


Global Boiler Services


Global Boiler Services specializes in marine boiler service and assistance that helps our customers with all their needs to enhance and prolong the life of their boilers. Our team of professionals is available to assist with automation, repairs and spare parts.


With strategically located branches in Denmark, Dubai and Singapore, we are your global partner, ready to serve you wherever you are in the world, whenever your boiler requires attention.


Read more about Global Boiler Services at : https://globalboilerservices.gomaritimegroup.com 

Singapore - Contact details: +65 91455993 / +65 86888847


HJ lubricators


We are the world’s leading manufacturer of cylinder lubrication systems, applied on some of the world’s largest cargo vessels. Through our products and expertise, we help shipping companies all over the world to reduce their cylinder lube oil consumption as well as reduce the climate impact of their vessels and improve the condition of the engines.


Hans Jensen Lubricators is a technology and manufacturing company that develops, sells, manufactures, installs and services its own products. We have a proud history that dates back more than 100 years and today the company employs approx. 100 staff at our offices in Denmark, Shanghai and Singapore. We are recognized in the market, of delivering state-of-the-art technology and knowledge.


Read more about us: www.360.hjlubri.dk or at www.hjlubri.dk or www.hjlubricators.com

Tel:+65 6274 1911; Website: www.hjlubri.com


Office Address: 12H Enterprise Road, 10 Enterprise, Singapore 627688
